evals.name: user-create-form
evals.prompt: I'm building a 'Create user' page in an IGRP app (templates/demo-legacy style). I need a form with: full name, email, role (admin / editor / viewer), active toggle, and a phone number. Validate with Zod. Show me the React component.
evals.expected_output: A 'use client' file using IGRPForm + Zod schema, with IGRPInputText/IGRPInputPhone/IGRPSelect (or IGRPRadioGroup)/IGRPSwitch wired by `name`. No raw <form>, no react-hook-form imports, no primitive <Input>. Submit button is IGRPButton type='submit'.

evals.name: users-data-table
evals.prompt: Give me an IGRP data table component listing users with columns: name, email, status badge (active/blocked), created date, and a row actions menu (Edit / Delete). The data comes from a prop.
evals.expected_output: Uses IGRPDataTable + createIGRPColumnHelper<User>(). Status column uses IGRPDataTableCellBadge with a map. Row actions use IGRPDataTableRowAction (destructive variant for Delete). showPagination + showFilter enabled. 'use client'. No raw TanStack imports.

evals.name: kpi-dashboard-card
evals.prompt: I want a dashboard widget: a card with title 'Receita mensal', a small subtitle, and a bar chart inside showing monthly revenue for 6 months. Pick the right components and colors.
evals.expected_output: Uses IGRPCard wrapping IGRPVerticalBarChart (or IGRPHorizontalBarChart). Chart colors come from IGRP_CHART_COLORS, config from createChartConfig. Tokens only — no hex colors. 'use client'.
